ConnectionStrings.//Postgres: Real value is provided via .NET user-secrets (no secret in the repo — Art. VI.4 / ADR-0012).

//KeyVault: Cloud only (E0-07 / ADR-0012). Set 'KeyVault:Uri' (or env KeyVault__Uri) to a vault URI in non-Development environments to bind Azure Key Vault as a config source. Absent locally → no-op (no Azure dependency). NEVER commit a real vault URI or secret (Art. VI.4).
//AzureAI: AI keys are SERVER-SIDE ONLY (Art. VI.4 / Art. IV). No AI client exists yet (E2). When added, the Azure AI Foundry key lives at 'AzureAI:ApiKey' via user-secrets locally / Key Vault in the cloud — never in the repo and never exposed to the frontend. Local command: dotnet user-secrets set "AzureAI:ApiKey" "<your-foundry-key>" --project src/Jaarplanner.Api
